𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

I never truly realized how strange it is to write the names of irl authors on the most diabolical bots ever. E.A.P in particular is a popular American author, and as an American (yes go ahead and throw tomatoes at me, I'm sorry), it's so surreal to basically be writing smut about a character based on a well known author from my country LMAO 😭

But uh yeah, more spice from me. Whether that's good or bad, you can have it anyways. Idk what I'm saying rn, it's late but I wanted to write this silly thing.
